headline: Dow jumps 800 points, S&P 500 at new record, Nasdaq gains 6.8% this week
summary: All three of the market indexes (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) closed Friday's session with significant gains, led by the Dow Jones Industrial Average which rose by nearly 868 points (1.79%) in the day. The S&P 500 ended the trading week 4.5% higher while the Nasdaq Composite surged by 6.84%. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre notes the fresh record highs for US stocks.

headline: Home Depot Weighs SIMPL Automation Deal Against Valuation And Debt Concerns
summary: Home Depot (NYSE:HD) has agreed to acquire Massachusetts based SIMPL Automation to support its fulfillment and warehouse automation plans. The deal is aimed at expanding same day and next day order capabilities across Home Depot’s distribution network. SIMPL Automation’s technology is expected to be integrated into Home Depot facilities to support faster, more efficient handling of online and store orders. headline: United States Residential Remodeling Industry Report 2025-2033: Modernization Trends, Energy-efficient Upgrades, and Demand for Aesthetic Improvements Driving Growth
summary: The United States Residential Remodeling Market is projected to grow from US$ 556.37 billion in 2025 to US$ 804.02 billion by 2033, achieving a CAGR of 4.71%. Key factors driving this growth include aging housing stock, rising homeowner equity, modernization trends, and a focus on energy efficiency and sustainability. headline: Shares of retail and apparel-related stocks are trading higher amid overall market strength after Iran opened the Strait of Hormuz for the remainder of the ceasefire following a 10-day armistice between Israel and Lebanon. This alleviates the ongoing supply disruption and lessens energy costs.

headline: Home Depot eyes same-day, next-day delivery site in New York
summary: The potential distribution center in Yaphank, which the retailer is seeking a tax break for, would be part of its wider supply chain investment strategy.
